# Pixlgrove

> Pixlgrove is a web design and development studio that builds pixel-perfect, fast, conversion-focused websites for businesses worldwide. Work is delivered in days to a few weeks, with transparent one-time pricing.

## What we do

- **Website design** — custom UI/UX built around your brand (not templates), mobile-first, Figma files included, unlimited revisions.
- **Web development** — hand-coded or CMS-powered (HTML/CSS, React, Next.js, WordPress, Webflow, Sanity), e-commerce (Shopify, WooCommerce), performance-optimised and SEO-ready.
- **Ongoing support** — content updates, performance monitoring, security updates, new features, priority response within 24 hours.

## Pricing

- **Starter — $499 (one-time):** 1–3 page website, mobile responsive, contact form, basic SEO, delivered in 5–7 days.
- **Growth — $999 (one-time):** 5–8 page custom website, CMS integration, lead capture, SEO optimised, delivered in 10–14 days.
- **Custom:** unlimited pages, e-commerce/Shopify, custom integrations, ongoing support, dedicated project manager.

## Contact

- Email: hello@pixlgrove.com
